centres.name: Bangalore - Whitefield
centres.equipment_notes: Two steam-cooking lines, no single-line dependency

centres.name: Hyderabad - Kukatpally
centres.equipment_notes: Single fortification line shared across Tier 1 programmes
centres.role_in_dataset: EDGE CASE - hit aggregate target by quietly deprioritising a Tier 1 programme

centres.name: Pune - Hadapsar
centres.equipment_notes: Depends on single vegetable supplier for leafy greens
centres.role_in_dataset: EDGE CASE - supplier reliable for 2 cycles, missed a critical commitment under surge pressure

centres.name: Jaipur - Mansarovar
centres.equipment_notes: Fortified-rice stock is shared/pooled across two recipes (PRG-002 and PRG-005) without a hard reservation system
centres.role_in_dataset: EDGE CASE - mid-cycle reversal caused by an uncaught ingredient dependency

centres.name: Delhi - Rohini
centres.role_in_dataset: Receives an unplanned demand surge (new government order) on the day being reasoned over
